title: あなたはSecurity Analystです。OWASP Top 10を参考に分析します。 ## チェック項目 - SQLインジェクション - XSS - CSRF - 認証・認可の不備 - 機密情報のハードコード - コマンドインジェクション ## 評価（3点満点） 3点: 問題なし 2点: 軽微な懸念 1点: 要対応 0点: 重大な脆弱性 ## 出力形式（JSON） { "score": 0-3, "vulnerabilities": [{ "severity": "critical|high|medium|low", "type": "", "description": "", "rem...
summary_text: { "score": 0, "vulnerabilities": [ { "severity": "critical", "type": "command_injection", "description": "Arbitrary shell execution is possible in /Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/delegate-copilot.js:29. The script builds a shell command with execSync(`copilot -p ${JSON.stringify(prompt)} --allow-all-tools`). Because this is shell-interpreted, prompt content containing shell substitutions such as $(...) or backticks can execute locally. Task text and file content are attacker-influenced inputs in this wrapper.", "remediation": "Replace execSync(string) with spawn/execFile and pass arguments as an array, e.g. ['-p', prompt, '--allow-all-tools']. Treat prompt/file input as untrusted, disable shell invocation entirely, and add regression tests for payloads containing $(...), backticks, quotes, and newlines." }, { "severity": "high", "type": "authentication_authorization", "description": "The fallback bridge is configured to bypass approval boundaries for broad MCP requests. /Users/masayuki/.claude/fallback/config.json:27 sets closed_service_bridge_permission_mode to bypassPermissions, config.json:69-76 includes a catch-all closed service token mcp__, and /Users/masayuki/.claude/fallback/orchestrator.sh:509-512 plus 1184-1186 convert any mcp__* token into a Claude bridge call with --allow-dangerously-skip-permissions. This weakens the intended authorization boundary for tool use.", "remediation": "Remove the generic mcp__ catch-all, keep an explicit allowlist only, and default the bridge to a non-bypass permission mode. Require human approval or a narrowly scoped policy for high-risk MCP actions, and log when the bridge elevates permissions." }, { "severity": "medium", "type": "insecure_permissions", "description": "Sensitive runtime artifacts are stored in world-readable locations. Observed permissions include /Users/masayuki/.claude/state and /Users/masayuki/.claude/cache as 0755, /Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/output as 0755, multiple files under those paths as 0644, and /Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-worker/.env as 0644. The code paths writing these artifacts do not enforce restrictive modes in /Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/delegate.js:453-503 and /Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib/run-state.js:17-46. Impact is local-user data exposure of prompts, outputs, run metadata, and environment-based credentials.", "remediation": "Create runtime directories with 0700 and files with 0600, enforce chmod after writes, and set a restrictive umask before startup. Move sensitive outputs out of shared-readable directories, and review existing /Users/masayuki/.claude/state, /Users/masayuki/.claude/cache, /Users/masayuki/.claude/fallback/logs, and /Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/output permissions." }, { "severity": "medium", "type": "hardcoded_secret", "description": "A live-looking Supabase credential is hardcoded in /Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-worker/.env:1-2. It is an anon key rather than a service-role key, so impact may be limited by Supabase RLS and API policy, but it is still credential material persisted in plaintext and currently world-readable. The matching .env.example also embeds the real project URL, increasing targeting value.", "remediation": "Move the credential to a user-scoped secret store or untracked secret file with 0600 permissions, keep only placeholders in examples, and verify that Supabase RLS/policies fully constrain anon access. If any worker path actually requires service-role privileges, split those credentials and never co-locate them in a readable .env." }, { "severity": "low", "type": "command_injection", "description": "The launch wrappers execute shell content from user-controlled config files. /Users/masayuki/.claude/auto-task/run-poller.sh:6-13 sources ~/.claude/auth.env and evals matching export lines from ~/.zshrc. T...
